title: Haluk Yürekli: Everything is set with Lemina. But the official contract hasn't been signed yet. They are waiting to see what happens with the foreign player quota. I expect the TFF to make changes to its foreign player rule within the next 1–2 days.
summary: - I expect the board of directors to meet within the next day or two. The focus is on the 12+2 and 12+5 formulas. Meanwhile, there is complete unanimity among the clubs. There were some clubs that opposed it. But in the end, the decision was passed unanimously. That’s a good thing. They’re able to reach an understanding with one another. Haluk Yürekli: Actually, Galatasaray is the team best suited for the 10+4 rule right now. Why? Galatasaray is already winning the championship with this roster. So let’s say Galatasaray now has 10+4. Icardi’s contract expires today. They’ll let Nelson go. Lemina’s contract is expiring. Galatasaray will be left with 8 foreign players. There’s Jelert and Nhaga. They’re currently at 8+2. So Galatasaray gains the right to sign 2 young players and 2 other suitable players. Fenerbahçe has 22 foreign players. Galatasaray doesn’t. Galatasaray had already prepared for this situation by signing 3 players on loan during the winter transfer window, but they’ve since left. In terms of the foreign player quota, Galatasaray actually has a huge advantage over other clubs. Both Trabzonspor and Galatasaray are in a favorable position. But here’s how I distinguish between Galatasaray and Trabzon: Galatasaray is on another level. One is the champion. The other doesn’t even come close to Galatasaray in terms of squad quality. Despite this, Galatasaray says, “Look, we’re not satisfied with this.” Galatasaray is setting a vision: “Give us a little more leeway with our roster so I can achieve significant success in the Champions League. My goal is the Turkish League, but my main objective is the Champions League. Haluk Yürekli: Mauro Icardi hasn’t said either ‘yes’ or ‘no’ to Galatasaray for a month. Why is Icardi stringing Galatasaray along? You tell him, ‘Make your decision by this date.’ Training camp starts in 8 days. Will Icardi join training camp or not? This needs to be clarified now. Galatasaray shouldn’t accept Icardi’s stance of ‘I’ll travel around, take a vacation, and accept the offer in August.’ If he’s staying, he’ll undergo a medical exam on July 7. If not, this is entirely the responsibility of those managing this operation. This isn’t a situation that can be resolved by dragging it out over time. Haluk Yürekli: Galatasaray will set a budget of approximately 100 M€, combining sponsorship revenue and Champions League revenue Haluk Yürekli: I just can’t understand the people who want Lucas Torreira to leave! They forget that Torreira hasn’t missed a single practice or game in four seasons, and they say, ‘Torreira is 30 now, let’s let him go.’ Let’s let Torreira go because he’s 30, but when it comes to signing 35-year-old İlkay, let’s sign him! Let’s look at this from a cost perspective. You paid Singo five times Torreira’s transfer fee. I’m saying this to highlight the injustice done to Lucas Torreira. Haluk Yürekli: Okan Buruk's contract isn't running out. It runs for one more year. The +1 option has been extended. Haluk Yürekli: Galatasaray has some young players they’ve been working on quietly behind the scenes. Loan offers are being made, some are being rejected, and some processes are underway. Haluk Yürekli: I know there are some speculations circulating about major players whose names are currently being kept under wraps. There are also expectations surrounding Bruno Fernandes. A new regulation regarding the foreign player rule is expected. Various sponsorship deals are being planned to meet the salary cap. As for Can Uzun, according to information I’ve received from the club, the player is eager to join Galatasaray, but the transfer fee will be the deciding factor here. I think this transfer will proceed slowly and can only happen if Frankfurt agrees to the requested amount. So far, Galatasaray and Frankfurt haven’t sat down at the negotiating table! I expect Galatasaray fans will have to wait a little longer for this transfer. submitted by /u/eanwen0 to r/galatasaray link yorumlar

Resmi verilere göre, 25 adet yüksek kapasiteli yeni nesil yolcu uçağının tedarik süreci resmiyet kazandı. Fabrika liste fiyatları üzerinden 9,35 milyar dolarlık hacme ulaşan bu büyük ticari işlemde, toplu siparişlere uygulanan özel indirimler geçerli olacak. Yeni yolcu gemilerinin önümüzdeki yıllarda kademeli olarak filoya katılması ve havayolunun küresel rekabet gücünü artırması bekleniyor.
